text.tspan: Attacker does NOT respond to victim,\ninstead relays to target
Attacker now has authenticated session\nwith victim's privileges on target

Requirements for Success:
• SMB signing disabled on target
• Victim must have admin rights on target
• Victim must attempt authentication
• Cannot relay back to same machine

Detection:
Event 4624 Logon Type 3
Event 4648 (Explicit credentials)
Unusual source IP for authentication
SMB connections from non-standard hosts
Multiple failed relay attempts

Mitigation:
Enable SMB signing (Require)
Disable LLMNR/NBT-NS
Local Admin Password Solution (LAPS)
Network segmentation

svg.text: User types incorrect share:\n\\fileserverr\share\n(typo in name)
Relay NTLM Type 1 NEGOTIATE\nto high-value target
NTLM Type 3: RESPONSE\n(challenge encrypted with hash)
Create persistence:\nNew admin user, scheduled task
